scenarios.prompt: Use the exact skill claude-api. I need to plan a small Claude Messages API integration for a Python app. Give the first four adapted steps, one verification check, and one guardrail.

Use the exact skill webapp-testing. I need a browser-focused test plan for a new signup flow. Give the first four adapted steps, one verification check, and one guardrail.
Use the exact skill github_pr. I need a pull-request review and merge plan for a risky Python refactor. Give the first four adapted steps, one verification check, and one guardrail.
Use the exact skill data_export. I need to export customer usage data to CSV safely. Give the first four adapted steps, one verification check, and one guardrail.
Use the exact skill figma_code_connect_components. I need to map Figma components to our React design system. Give the first four adapted steps, one verification check, and one guardrail.
Use the exact skill figma_generate_design. I need an initial dashboard design from a product brief. Give the first four adapted steps, one verification check, and one guardrail.
